'''Edugenic Harm''' (N): The harm done by educators to students. Edugenic harm is analogous to [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Iatrogenesis iatrogenic harm].

Source: [https://teachmeteacherpodcast.com/2021/03/02/200-eric-weinstein-on-edugenic-harm-and-neurodiversity/ Teach Me, Teacher - Episode 200]

[[Category:Ericisms]]
[[sn:Edugenic Harm]][[Category:Education]][[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
